title: coreopsis senaria
intro: Coreopsis senaria, also known as the golden ragwort or yellow coreopsis, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Coreopsis senaria include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Coreopsis senaria can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
